Meta.title: Klick — Apply. On your terms.
Meta.description: Klick is the recruiting platform that leaves your data with you. You decide per employer what gets shared and what gets verified.

hero.title: Apply. On your terms.
hero.subtitle: Klick is your private application folder. Upload your CV, certificates and open badges once — then decide per employer what gets shared and what gets verified.

manifesto.title: Three promises we don't break.
manifesto.body: Recruiting has lost its dignity. Data is hoarded, profiles are scraped, CVs are dissected before any real conversation. We flip that around.

1.title: Your data, your call
1.body: Everything in the vault is encrypted with XChaCha20-Poly1305. You delete what you want to delete — anytime, no questions asked.

2.title: Verification on demand
2.body: Only when an employer is seriously interested do we run a check. You approve each item. You see the result first.

3.title: No public profile
3.body: You are not searchable. Matches come to you anonymously — you decide whether to reveal yourself.

candidateJourney.title: Five steps. No more CV ping-pong.

1.title: Open the vault
1.body: Magic-link sign-in. No password, no tracking. You're in within 30 seconds.

2.title: Upload documents
2.body: CV, references, certificates, ID. Encrypted at the moment of upload.

3.title: AI extracts your profile
3.body: Claude reads your CV, recognises skills, industries, mobility. You correct as needed.

4.title: Anonymous matches arrive
4.body: Roles that fit you — with salary verdict, commute estimate and an AI-written rationale.

5.title: You decide
5.body: Per request you grant: which file becomes visible, which check may run, whether your name is revealed.

employerJourney.title: Post a role. Get real profiles.

1.title: Create a role
1.body: Type or upload a PDF — Klick extracts requirements, salary band and location automatically.

2.title: Match engine runs
2.body: Hard filters (must-have skills, minimum tenure) plus soft score with career-pivot tolerance and commute check.

3.title: Anonymous shortlist
3.body: Top candidates with score, pros & cons, match rationale, salary fairness — no real names yet.

4.title: Interest + verification
4.body: You pick the verification depth and write a message. Identity and vault appear only after approval.

features.title: Everything you need. Nothing we sell.

vault.title: Encrypted vault
vault.body: Envelope encryption with per-user DEK. Drag-and-drop or camera upload from mobile.

cv.title: AI profile from CV
cv.body: Claude detects skills, industries, mobility, awards, language level. Mock works offline.

badges.title: Open Badges & Credly
badges.body: Add by URL — JSON-LD parsed, issuer verified, authenticity signaled.

verify.title: Verification on demand
verify.body: Mock, Credly or IDnow — per request. Connector pattern, more sources pluggable.

match.title: Match engine
match.body: Skill clusters for career pivots, commute via OSRM/OTP, salary band check, AI rationale.

salary.title: Salary benchmark
salary.body: AI compares the job's salary to the market. Candidate sees: under, fair, over.

insights.title: Insights & tenure score
insights.body: Tenure, gaps, switch rhythm, certificate quality, issuer legitimacy.

disclosure.title: Per-file disclosure
disclosure.body: Even after approval: grant or revoke each file individually. Audit log included.

public.title: Public profile (optional)
public.body: Generate a share link with a token. Revoke anytime — old links die instantly.

1.title: XChaCha20-Poly1305
1.body: libsodium envelope with per-user DEK. Server only sees plaintext briefly during upload.

2.title: EU region
2.body: Postgres and object storage in Germany (Hetzner). No US data transfers.

3.title: Audit log
3.body: Every grant, every vault access, every verification logged with timestamp and actor.

4.title: Hard delete
4.body: When you delete, it's gone. No soft-delete shadows, no backups bringing it back.

1.a: Nothing. Ever. We earn through employer subscriptions — not through your data.

2.q: What if the AI gets something wrong?
2.a: Every field is editable. The AI is a suggestion, not a verdict — you remain in control.

3.a: One click. Hard delete. Even the encrypted blob in storage is removed.

4.a: We read the official JSON-LD URL and check the issuer against our allowlist (~35 established providers).

5.q: Does it work in my industry?
5.a: Klick is industry-agnostic. Skill clusters cover tech, design, marketing, data, mobile and more — with career-pivot logic.

finalCta.title: Ready for an application with dignity?
finalCta.body: Magic link, no password. In two minutes your vault is open.

Login.title: Sign in to Klick
Login.subtitle: We'll send you a magic link. No password, no tracking.
Login.note: In dev, the link appears in the server console.
Login.demoSubtitle: Pick a role to enter the app from that perspective. Only visible because ENABLE_DEMO_LOGIN is set.

demoDescriptions.company: Acme Studios with 3 published roles + match list.
demoDescriptions.headhunter: Talent Hunters AG, recruiting for 2 senior roles.
demoDescriptions.candidate: Senior frontend engineer with insights, vault, matches.

LoginCheck.title: Check your inbox
LoginCheck.body: We've sent you a sign-in link. Click it to continue.

Vault.title: My vault
Vault.subtitle: Encrypted at rest. What you put here is invisible without your approval.
Vault.empty: Nothing here yet. Drop a file in the box above.
Vault.dropTitle: Drop here or tap to choose
Vault.dropHint: PDF, images, open badges — up to 25 MB
Vault.badgeUrlHint: Got a Credly badge or another Open Badge URL? Paste the JSON-LD link and we'll pull in name, issuer and image automatically.

Profile.title: My profile

share.title: Public share link
share.subtitle: Optional. Exposes a read-only profile page you can share — e.g. in an application or your CV header. You can revoke anytime.

Profile.subtitle: What employers see once you allow interest. You control visibility and content.
Profile.importHint: Pick a CV from your vault — the fields below get pre-filled with the AI's suggestion. You review and correct.
Profile.importDisclaimer: The AI makes mistakes. Check everything. Save only when correct.
Profile.noCvHint: Upload a CV to your vault first (kind = CV), then it shows up here.
Profile.headline: Current position
Profile.skillsHint: One skill per line. Optional level 1–5 after a colon.
Profile.compensationHint: We show employers your target salary in match lists. Your minimum is used internally for fairness scoring.
Profile.contactabilityHint: You can exclude headhunters. Offers from agencies will be blocked; direct employers still come through.

all.title: Everyone: companies + headhunters
all.body: You receive offers from both. Agency offers are clearly labeled.

employers_only.title: Direct employers only
employers_only.body: Recruiters/headhunters are blocked. Only direct employers may reach out.

none.title: Nobody (paused)
none.body: You're offline for new requests. Existing negotiations continue.

Profile.openToOffersHint: Confirmed every 30 days — after that we reset it automatically and remind you.

private.title: Private
private.body: Only you see this profile. No match suggestions to employers.

matches_only.title: Matches only
matches_only.body: Visible anonymized in match suggestions. Identity only after your approval.

public.title: Public
public.body: Searchable by any employer. No anonymization.

Profile.careerSubtitle: A comprehensive read of your profile — salary band, fitting industries, non-obvious industry hits, certification suggestions, pros/cons. Generated on demand via AI; only you see it.
Profile.referencesSubtitle: Invite former managers or peers to answer three questions. You see the answers — the employer only sees them if you grant access.
Profile.diversitySubtitle: Fully voluntary. We only ever show data in aggregate (min 5 people per bucket) and never directly to employers — it helps us detect matching bias.

Matches.title: Job matches
Matches.subtitle: Jobs that fit your profile. Anonymized to the employer until you allow interest.
Matches.empty: No matches yet. Save your profile and wait for published jobs.
Matches.nextStep1: You stay anonymous. Employers see only headline + skills, no name.
Matches.nextStep2: When an employer shows interest, verification runs and you get a request in 'Requests'.
Matches.nextStep3: You decide per request: reveal identity (or not) — and per file which to share.
Matches.adjacentTooltip: Career-pivot — you bring an adjacent skill
Matches.candidatesSubtitle: Anonymized suggestions — identity only after the candidate approves an interest request.
Matches.candidatesEmpty: No candidates for this job yet. Match runs in the background after publishing.
Matches.draftHint: This job is a draft. Publish it to run matching.
Matches.anonymizedHint: Anonymized. Show interest, then the candidate decides on identity.
Matches.revealedHint: Identity revealed. Vault disclosure ships in P5.5.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: Platform overview. Full tenant + connector management ships in P7.
Admin.auditFootnote: Append-only. Entries remain after source records are deleted, for compliance.
Admin.comingDynamicRoutes: Dynamic API route management in the UI (proxy / sql / jsonata handlers)
Admin.comingConnectors: Verify connector definitions (Credly partner OAuth, IDnow sandbox)

AdminCms.title: Content (CMS)
AdminCms.subtitle: Static pages like imprint, privacy, terms. Public at /<slug>.
AdminCms.empty: No pages yet. Start from a template:
AdminCms.slugHint: URL segment, e.g. 'imprint'. Lowercase, digits, dashes only.
AdminCms.bodyHint: Plain text with newlines. Rendered as-is.
AdminCms.starterImprint:
Provider:
[Company]
[Address]
[Postal code, city]

Represented by:
[CEO]

Contact:
Phone: [Number]
E-mail: [Address]

Register entry:
Commercial register, court [City], number [HRB ...]
AdminCms.starterPrivacy:
Privacy policy

1. Controller
[Provider as in imprint]

2. Data processed
E-mail, profile fields you enter, vault content (encrypted at rest).

3. Purpose
Matchmaking between candidates and employers.

4. Retention
Profile data until account deletion. Vault content until you delete it.

5. Your rights
Access, rectification, deletion, restriction, portability. Write to [email].

6. Objection
You can object to processing at any time.
AdminCms.starterTerms:
Terms of Service

1. Scope
These terms govern use of the Klick platform.

2. Service
Klick connects candidates with employers. No claim to placement arises.

3. User obligations
Truthful information. No sharing of credentials.

4. Data protection
See privacy policy.

5. Liability
Klick is liable only for intent and gross negligence.

6. Governing law
German law applies. Venue: [city].

Interest.title: Show interest
Interest.subtitle: The candidate sees your request and decides whether to reveal their identity.

light.title: Light — profile only
light.body: Reveals name, location and summary. No third-party check.

standard.title: Standard — + CV verification
standard.body: Adds CV authenticity (layout heuristics) and open-badge validation. (Connector ships P6)

deep.title: Deep — + identity verification
deep.body: Adds identity check via external provider (IDnow, Postident). (Connector ships P6)

Interest.messagePlaceholder: What draws you to this candidate? What would be the next steps?
Interest.decideHint: You release only name + email. Vault contents are requested later (P5.5) per file.

Requests.title: Requests for you
Requests.subtitle: Employers wanting to talk. You decide per request.
Requests.empty: No requests yet. Save your profile and wait for match interest.

disclosures.title: Share specific files
disclosures.subtitle: Pick which vault items this employer can read. Revoke anytime.

referenceDisclosure.title: Share references with this employer
referenceDisclosure.subtitle: Per reference, choose whether the employer sees the answers. You can revoke at any time.

depthExplain.light: Releases identity (name + email). No external check.
depthExplain.standard: Adds CV authenticity and badge validation via external connectors.
depthExplain.deep: Adds external identity verification (e.g. IDnow / Postident).

Requests.verificationsHint: These checks run once you approve. You see the results first.

Jobs.title: Jobs
Jobs.subtitle: Your job postings. Match suggestions go live in P4.
Jobs.benchmarkUnder: You're paying {pct}% below market — consider raising.
Jobs.benchmarkOver: You're paying {pct}% above market — likely room to negotiate.

uploader.title: Upload job posting
uploader.hint: Drop a PDF or image — AI fills title, description, requirements, salary and languages automatically. You verify and tweak.
uploader.dropTitle: Drop here or tap to choose
uploader.dropHint: PDF or image — up to 25 MB. Read on the fly, not stored.
uploader.done: Done — fields are filled. Please review and tweak.

Jobs.listEmpty: No job yet. Create one and it shows up here.
Jobs.editorHint: Write the title and description first — the skill suggester works from those.
Jobs.onboardingHint: We'll create your employer profile. The name shows above your dashboard.
Jobs.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this team do? What does this role actually own? What's expected in the first 6 months?
Jobs.requirementsEmpty: No requirements yet. Use "Suggest skills" or add manually.

draft.title: Draft
draft.body: Only you see this. No matches are produced.

archived.title: Archived
archived.body: Out of matching, but kept on file.

Jobs.confirmDelete: Really delete this job? Cannot be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to Klick.
welcome.subtitle: In a few minutes we'll set up your profile so the right employers can find you — without you being on display.

1.title: Basics
1.body: Name, location, experience. Three fields, no photo, no required fields.

2.title: Upload your CV (optional)
2.body: We read it encrypted and pre-fill the next step. You verify everything yourself.

3.title: Skills & experience
3.body: What you're good at. You can add more anytime.

4.title: Visibility
4.body: You decide who can find you — before anyone gets a hint.

basics.title: Who are you?
basics.subtitle: Employers only see this once you approve their request.
basics.displayNameHint: Real name or a pseudonym. Change it anytime.
basics.headlineLabel: In one sentence: what do you do?
basics.headlineHint: Current role or focus — not a CV, just a label.
basics.headlinePlaceholder: Senior frontend engineer focused on design systems
basics.commuteMaxHint: What you're willing to commute daily (for non-remote roles).

upload.title: Your CV — encrypted in the vault.
upload.subtitle: Optional. If you upload one, the AI can pre-fill skills + experience in the next step.
upload.dropTitle: Drop here or tap to choose
upload.dropHint: PDF or image — up to 25 MB. Encrypted on arrival.

skills.title: What can you actually do?
skills.subtitle: Skills drive the match. Add more details later in your profile.
skills.importHint: We extract skills, summary, experience + education from '{filename}'. You verify everything.
skills.skillsHint: One skill per line. Optional level 1–5 after a colon — e.g. 'TypeScript: 5'.
skills.summaryPlaceholder: Two or three sentences. What drives you, what you love working on.
skills.moreLater: You can add work experience and education anytime in 'Profile'.

visibility.title: Who can find you?
visibility.subtitle: You can change this anytime. The default is the anonymous match view — employers only see you once you reveal yourself.

private.title: Private
private.body: Nobody sees your profile. No match suggestions.

matches_only.title: Matches only (recommended)
matches_only.body: Employers see anonymized suggestions. Identity revealed only on your approval.

public.title: Public
public.body: Your profile is visible to logged-in employers — no request needed.

done.title: Done.
done.subtitle: Your profile is live. We're looking for matching jobs in the background from now on.
done.celebrationBody: Check the first match suggestions or polish your profile.

welcome.title: Welcome.
welcome.subtitle: Two quick steps and you can post roles and see matching profiles.

1.title: Set up your company
1.body: Name, website, a few lines about who you are. Recruiter agency? Check the box.

2.title: Post your first role
2.body: We'll suggest required skills directly from your description.

company.title: Who are you?
company.subtitle: Candidates see this once they accept a match.
company.descriptionPlaceholder: We build tools for creative teams …
company.descriptionHint: Two or three sentences. Shown in the match.
company.agencyHint: So candidates know the role is filled through you, not at your company. Klick surfaces this in the match.

done.title: Ready, {company}.
done.subtitleCompany: Your company profile is live. Post your first role now.
done.subtitleAgency: Your agency profile is live. Post the first position you're hiring for now.
done.celebrationBody: Once a role is live we'll suggest anonymized matching profiles.

Insights.empty: Once you fill in your profile or upload a CV, computed career insights show up here.
Insights.totalRolesHint: Number of employers on the CV.
Insights.conflictBody: Declared: {declared} years · Employment data shows {computed}. Please fill in missing dates or correct the declared value.

certs.title: Certificates & badges
certs.alignmentHint: Share of certificates whose title or issuer aligns with declared skills or roles.

focus.title: Focus vs. career detours
focus.body: {focused} roles in the core field, {detour} outside declared skills / education.

extras.title: Read from the CV
extras.certificationsMentionedHint: Mentioned in the CV body, not necessarily uploaded as a file in the vault.

PublicProfile.footerHint: Only what the person voluntarily made public. Vault content stays private. Reach out via Klick.

Browse.title: Browse jobs
Browse.subtitle: All published jobs in your workspace. With match score — how well you fit.
Browse.empty: No jobs found. Adjust filters or clear the search.
Browse.scoreHint: Score is based on your profile — no obligation to apply.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.empty: Nothing yet. Once matches, requests or offers come in, you'll see them here.

Offers.title: Your offers
Offers.subtitle: Concrete offers from companies or headhunters — with target salary and start date. Like a transfer offer.
Offers.empty: No offers yet. They'll show up here once someone makes you one.
Offers.decideHint: Accept → we share your identity with the sender. Counter → propose your number. Decline → it's settled.

EmployerActions.modalHint: We send a notification. The candidate decides: accept, decline or counter. Identity is only revealed on accept.
EmployerActions.messagePlaceholder: What draws you to this person? What do you offer that others don't?
EmployerActions.blockedNoOffers: This person isn't taking offers right now (paused or inactive).
EmployerActions.blockedAgency: This person only accepts offers from direct employers, not agencies.

Favorites.title: Favorites for this role
Favorites.subtitle: {count} people you've shortlisted.
Favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Click the star on a match to collect them here.

EmployerOffers.title: Offers for this role
EmployerOffers.subtitle: {count} ongoing or completed offers.
EmployerOffers.respondHint: Accept → deal closes (in the sense of this offer), identity is revealed. Counter back → another round. Withdraw → end negotiation.
EmployerOffers.waitingForCandidate: Waiting for the candidate to respond.

SavedSearches.title: Saved searches
SavedSearches.subtitle: We'll notify you when a new role matches your criteria. One notification — no inbox flood.
SavedSearches.emptyHint: On the jobs page you can save the current filters.

JobDetail.askHint: Ask the employer questions without revealing your identity. We do NOT share your name — only the question. Reply comes as a notification.
JobDetail.questionPlaceholder: How many on-site days? What's your backend stack? Why does this role excite you…
JobDetail.questionAnonymousHint: Anonymous — the employer only sees the question, not your name.
JobDetail.questionSent: Sent. You'll get a notification as soon as there's an answer.
JobDetail.assessmentHint: {count} questions — taking it helps the employer gauge your hard skills without you revealing your name.

EmployerQuestions.title: Questions on this role
EmployerQuestions.subtitle: {count} questions — anonymously from candidates.
EmployerQuestions.empty: No questions yet. They'll appear here as soon as someone wants to know something.
EmployerQuestions.answerPlaceholder: Clear, concise. If relevant for others → mark below as public.
EmployerQuestions.makePublic: Show as public FAQ on the job page

Assessment.subtitleEmployer: 3-7 questions that validate hard skills. Multiple-choice + open-ended. AI grades open answers against your rubric. Score appears in the match.
Assessment.title: Title
Assessment.descriptionPlaceholder: What candidates can expect — time estimate, no helpers allowed, …
Assessment.question: Question
Assessment.rubricPlaceholder: Optional grading rubric for the AI: what makes a good answer.
Assessment.aiNoSuggestions: The AI didn't return suggestions. Try again later or write your own.
Assessment.invalidQuestion: At least one question has empty text or empty answer options.
Assessment.assessmentHint: {count} questions — taking it helps the employer gauge your hard skills without you revealing your name.
Assessment.submittedHint: The AI is grading open answers right now. Score appears in the employer's match view.

Outcome.hintCandidate: Quick feedback on whether the offer led to a contract. Internal only — improves the matching.
Outcome.hintEmployer: Quick feedback helps the algorithm. Internal only.

Diversity.consentBlurb: All fields are optional. We only show data in aggregate (≥5 people) and never directly to employers. You can withdraw any time.

References.hint: We send an email with three short questions + a private link. The reply lands in your profile — the employer only sees it if you grant access.

Reference.title: Hello {name}
Reference.hint: You were named as a reference on Klick. Answer three short questions — only the requester will see your replies.
Reference.alreadySubmitted: Thank you — your answers have already been recorded.
Reference.expired: This link has expired. Reach out to the requester directly if you'd still like to reply.

ReferenceDisclosure.noReferences: No answered references yet — send a request from your profile first.

AdminInsights.title: Aggregated statistics
AdminInsights.subtitle: Tenant-wide analytics. Diversity buckets with under 5 people are suppressed to 0.
AdminInsights.diversityDisclaimer: {consented} of {total} candidates shared diversity data. Buckets under 5 suppressed.
AdminInsights.suppressionNote: Values under 5 are reported as 0 to prevent re-identification. Free-text ethnicity entries only appear if ≥5 people used the exact same wording.

Career.emptyHint: Let the AI deeply analyse your profile — salary band, primary and non-obvious industries, certifications, role options, market context. Takes ~30 seconds.
